problem id: baa9e4ea
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4)

examples:
  10110011 -> 00110000
  11001100 -> 11000000
  01001110 -> 11100000
  01000010 -> 00100000
  10001101 -> 11010000
  00100111 -> 01110000
  11100010 -> 00100000
  11010001 -> 00010000
  10001010 -> 10100000
  10010110 -> 01100000

query: 11110010
predicted answer: 00100000
